name: Downtown YMCA, Wichita Falls, TX
description: Downtown YMCA, Wichita Falls, TX is a place to play pickleball in Wichita Falls, TX. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Falls Town Courts at Weeks Park
description: Falls Town Courts at Weeks Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wichita Falls, TX. There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, water, and food. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Closed 1-4 on Tues, Wed, Thurs for open play
fees: Fee required — $5 walk in fee. Yearly court passes available

name: Hamilton Park Tennis Center
description: Hamilton Park Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wichita Falls, TX. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Jefferson Elementary School
description: Jefferson Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wichita Falls, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.
